artifacts.compiled_prompt:
SCENE
Contrast defines every plane — light compressed against shadow with no mid-tone to soften the force; the environment holds tension like a coiled spring. The vehicle anchors the composition with clear weight, ocean passing through foreground.

CAMERA
[0s: Wide, 24mm, focus environment] → [4s: Medium, orbit, 24mm, focus vehicle] → [6.8s: Medium, focus vehicle]

ACTION
[0–2.4s] Subject body settle.
[2.4–5.6s] Subject body present.
[5.6–8s] Environment background breathe.

STYLE
Central compositional weight — the subject at the frame's exact center; everything radiates outward from that anchor. A diagonal tension pulls from upper-left to lower-right — the most natural eye path, here made conscious and deliberate. Cinematic, hyperrealistic, no text overlays. Ultra-wide perspective (≤24mm), full environmental context. f/2.8. Building rhythm — gaining momentum through the shot.
